title: schoenus longisetis
intro: Schoenus longisetis, also known as the Australian saw-sedge, is a type of sedge plant native to Australia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Schoenus longisetis include its ability to alleviate coughs and relieve congestion, making it a popular herbal remedy for respiratory conditions. Schoenus longisetis can be prepared as a tea or infusion, where the leaves and stems are steeped in hot water to release its medicinal properties.
